title: bromus reimannii
intro: Bromus reimannii, also known as Reimann's brome or Chinese brome, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bromus reimannii are said to include relief from coughs and colds, as well as the ability to reduce fever and promote digestion. Herbal preparations of Bromus reimannii typically involve decocting the plant in water or using it as an infusion to create a tea that can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
